{{Shell
|name=Witch's Pot
|image=Witch's Pot.png
|description= Marvelpus cauldron used by witches to brew potions. Whether you put in chili peppers or toad legs, you'll always get sweet, delicious candy out of it!
|affct=FTH
|hard=HP
|source=[[Fantasy Tour]] Oct. 27 - Nov. 9 2023 
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=7
|fire=6
|wind=7
|form=Dragon
|element=Poison
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=ATK
}}
